name: Limit Design ltd
description: Developed a modern and responsive portfolio website for Limit Design Ltd, an architecture firm, using React.js, CSS, SCSS, and Bootstrap to ensure a visually appealing and user-friendly interface. The website features seamless authentication powered by Firebase Auth and utilizes Firestore as the database for efficient data management. This project showcases the firm's architectural work while providing an intuitive and engaging user experience.

name: Zentry
description: A highly interactive and visually dynamic website for a game, utilizing React.js, GSAP, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion to create a seamless and engaging user experience. The website features advanced animations and interactive elements, enhancing user immersion and bringing the game's essence to life. This project showcases a high level of creativity and technical expertise in front-end development and motion design.

name: Iphone-threeJS
description: Visually immersive website using React.js, GSAP, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, and Three.js, integrating advanced animations and interactive elements. The website features 3D object rendering, enhancing user engagement and delivering a unique, dynamic experience. This project demonstrates expertise in front-end development, animation, and 3D web technologies.

name: Porua AI
description: I developed an AI-powered web application that extracts and organizes notes from PDF files, enhancing productivity and information retrieval. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN, and Framer Motion, the app offers a seamless and visually appealing user experience. Clerk is integrated for secure authentication, while Gemini AI and LangChain power the AI-driven note extraction and processing capabilities. This project showcases expertise in AI integration, modern front-end development, and user-centric design

name: Musafirs Den
description: Developed a feature-rich e-commerce website tailored for travelers, offering a wide range of adventure tours and travel equipment. The platform is built using React.js, Redux, Bootstrap, and CSS to deliver an interactive and user-friendly shopping experience.For the backend, I implemented Node.js and Express.js, connected to MongoDB for efficient data management. Authentication is secured using JWT and bcrypt, ensuring a safe and seamless user experience. This project highlights expertise in full-stack web development, secure authentication, and e-commerce functionality

name: Bangkok Hospital
description: Developed a modern and responsive medical website using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Redux, providing detailed information about the hospital's services and enabling users to book appointments seamlessly. The platform is designed for an intuitive user experience, ensuring accessibility and efficiency for patients seeking medical consultations and various healthcare services. This project demonstrates expertise in front-end development, state management, and user-centric design.

name: FE Civil Practice Test
description: Built a full-stack online exam platform for the FE Civil engineering exam, delivering realistic, timed practice tests with detailed performance analytics. The application is developed with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS on the front end, backed by an Express.js and MongoDB (Mongoose) API with JWT authentication and Redux for state management. It integrates Stripe for subscription payments and AWS S3 for media storage, and ships a Notion-style rich-text editor that lets admins author and publish blog-like study content. This project demonstrates expertise in scalable full-stack architecture, payment integration, and content-management tooling.

name: Documind
description: Developed a full-stack AI platform that lets users upload PDFs and query their content through natural-language conversation. The app uses Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) to perform semantic search over document embeddings and return accurate, context-aware answers. It is built with Next.js and TypeScript on the front end, a Node.js and Express backend with MongoDB, and Convex for real-time data, while LangChain and Groq power the document processing and fast LLM inference. This project showcases applied AI engineering, RAG pipelines, and modern full-stack development.

name: Salaf Global
description: Built a smart mobile platform that helps advertisers and agencies manage their advertising accounts efficiently from a single dashboard. Users can monitor ad account balances, perform top-ups, track deposits and withdrawals, and manage Business Manager connections, helping teams stay organized and avoid costly account interruptions. The app is developed with React Native, TypeScript, and NativeWind, backed by a Node.js and Express API with MongoDB and Sentry for production monitoring. This project highlights cross-platform mobile development and the design of reliable financial-operations tooling.

name: IMTR
description: Developed a corporate Learning Management System (LMS) with role-based access control (RBAC) dashboards tailored to administrators, instructors, and learners. The platform features a coupon and discount system, automated certificate generation on course completion, and secure payments through SSLCommerz. It is built with Next.js and TypeScript on the front end and a Laravel (PHP) and MySQL backend, delivering a robust and scalable training solution. This project demonstrates expertise in access control, payment integration, and enterprise full-stack development.

name: Itqaan
description: Contributed to Itqaan, an Islamic learning platform serving thousands of learners daily, by developing a full-stack coupon system, course-detail pages, review functionality, and an admin analytics dashboard. The platform is built with Next.js and TypeScript on the front end and a Laravel (PHP) and MySQL backend, with Bootstrap for styling and SSLCommerz for secure payments. This project demonstrates expertise in scalable LMS features, e-commerce logic, and data-driven admin tooling.

name: eStore
description: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform featuring product variants, cart, wishlist, checkout flows, order history, and a complete management dashboard. It is developed with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS on the front end, backed by a Node.js and Express API with MongoDB (Mongoose), AWS S3 for media storage, and Jest for testing. This project highlights end-to-end e-commerce architecture, reliable state and order management, and a tested, maintainable codebase.

name: Mohiruh
description: A financial mobile app built to serve the ummah by promoting Qard Hasana (interest-free good debt) and fostering a community grounded in Islamic values. Users can facilitate and manage interest-free lending, helping people support one another without riba. The app is developed with React Native, Expo, and TypeScript, backed by a Node.js and Express API with MongoDB and AWS S3. This project demonstrates cross-platform mobile development in service of a values-driven community mission.

name: OptiCut
description: A free tool that solves the cutting-stock problem to minimize material waste and promote a low-waste society. It computes optimal cutting layouts so users can reduce offcuts and get the most out of their raw materials. The app is built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui, with Jest for testing. This project showcases applied optimization, a clean and accessible interface, and a sustainability-focused mission.
